LanguageData.VWE_MeleeWeapon_HeavyClub.description: A large, two handed, shaped stick for bashing enemies. Extreme weight at the end of this tool allows user to crush flesh and bones alike, leaving enemies maimed, paralysed and often dead.
LanguageData.VWE_MeleeWeapon_HeavyClub.label: heavy club
LanguageData.VWE_MeleeWeapon_HeavyClub.tools.0.label: handle
LanguageData.VWE_MeleeWeapon_HeavyClub.tools.1.label: head
LanguageData.VWE_MeleeWeapon_LightClub.description: A small, one handed club. Whilst it's fast to swing, it is not going to cause tremendous damage due to its low weight and short length.
LanguageData.VWE_MeleeWeapon_LightClub.label: light club
LanguageData.VWE_MeleeWeapon_LightClub.tools.0.label: handle
LanguageData.VWE_MeleeWeapon_LightClub.tools.1.label: head
LanguageData.VWE_MeleeWeapon_Shiv.description: One of mankind's oldest manufactured objects. A shiv is a short but sharp piece of rock or metal with a small handle.
LanguageData.VWE_MeleeWeapon_Shiv.label: shiv
LanguageData.VWE_MeleeWeapon_Shiv.tools.0.label: blade
LanguageData.VWE_MeleeWeapon_Shiv.tools.1.label: point
LanguageData.VWE_MeleeWeapon_TribalAxe.description: A sharp piece of rock mounted on a sturdy piece of wood. Often used as a tool, it has been recorded that tribal axes also served as a great weapon due to their small size and ability to inflict deep wounds.
LanguageData.VWE_MeleeWeapon_TribalAxe.label: tribal axe
LanguageData.VWE_MeleeWeapon_TribalAxe.tools.0.label: handle
LanguageData.VWE_MeleeWeapon_TribalAxe.tools.1.label: edge
